title: The Future of AI: Trends and Predictions
description: A deep dive into the future of Artificial Intelligence, exploring emerging trends, potential breakthroughs, and the ethical considerations that come with them.

title: Building Scalable and Resilient Microservices
description: Learn the best practices for designing, building, and deploying microservices that are both scalable and resilient, with a focus on real-world case studies.

title: The Power of Serverless: A Practical Guide
description: This talk will provide a practical guide to serverless computing, showcasing its benefits, use cases, and how to get started with building your own serverless applications.

title: Lunch Break
description: Enjoy a delicious lunch and network with other attendees.

title: Cybersecurity in the Age of IoT
description: As the number of IoT devices continues to grow, so do the security risks. This talk will explore the unique cybersecurity challenges posed by the Internet of Things and how to address them.

title: Mastering frontend development with modern Javascript
description: A comprehensive overview of the modern JavaScript ecosystem, including the latest frameworks, tools, and techniques for building high-quality user interfaces.

title: Quantum Computing: From Theory to Reality
description: Quantum computing is poised to revolutionize the world of computation. This talk will demystify the principles of quantum mechanics and explore the current state of quantum hardware and software.
